# repolish

> Package your standards. Own your edits.

Repolish is a template-push system with drift detection. Teams package
repository standards into providers; projects opt in via repolish.yaml and
pull updates with `repolish apply` or detect drift with `repolish --check`.

## Documentation

- [Home](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/)
- [Installation](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/getting-started/installation/)
- [Quick Start](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/getting-started/quick-start/)
- [Tutorial](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/tutorial/)
- [Concepts](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/concepts/overview/)
- [Provider Development](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/provider-development/overview/)
- [Provider Python API](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/provider-development/context/)
- [Testing Providers](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/provider-development/testing/)
- [repolish.yaml Schema](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/provider-development/config-file/)
- [Project Controls](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/project-controls/)
- [Preprocessors](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/concepts/preprocessors/)
- [Monorepo](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/concepts/monorepo/)
- [Resource Linker](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/provider-development/linker/)
- [CLI Reference](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/reference/)
- [AI Agent Reference (full)](https://hotdog-werx.github.io/repolish/llms/)
